cases.prompt: Set up Microsoft Priva to manage subject rights requests (DSARs).

expect.label: Priva depends on accurate classification - SITs first
Coordinate with legal / privacy office before going live
Apply least-privilege roles; SRR content is highly sensitive
Test SRR workflow with a dry-run before publishing intake form

cases.prompt: Which Priva solution should I roll out first?

expect.label: Start with Privacy Risk Management overexposure before SRR
Reason: leaks generate more SRRs than you can handle

cases.prompt: What licence do I need for Priva Subject Rights Requests?

expect.label: Priva is a separate add-on SKU, not bundled in M365 E5 Compliance
SRR is licensed per request; Privacy Risk Management is per-user per-month
